hypothesis: If STR-Bamba is pre-trained to jointly encode seven molecular representations into a unified latent space, then it will achieve higher downstream property prediction accuracy across MoleculeNet, polymer, and electrolyte datasets and better cross-representation translation quality across SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, and IUPAC than models trained on a single representation, because multimodal pre-training aligns complementary information from multiple representations into a coherent latent space.
